definition: The USE syllable-shaping state machine transitions to a specific case (case 10, use_sakot_terminated_cluster) only when the glyph-category byte falls within a range [_keys[0], _keys[1]]; I2S stamps the exact category-key byte from the intercepted range comparison into the input while VP's CMP_MAP range-distance gradient preserves near-miss category sequences as corpus, both being jointly necessary because the exact glyph-category byte is an opaque encoding that VP's gradient cannot converge on without I2S seeding the boundary value.

authoring_contract.goal: ONE parameterized template.c isolating this cluster's shared mechanism, with exactly ONE compile-time -D knob = the program-feature axis. params.json:parameter MUST name that macro; scan_values sweep it; fuzzers = involved_fuzzers; expected_direction = '<winner> > <loser>'.
authoring_contract.isolate: No partial-match coverage edges unless the mechanism IS a gradient (VP families). Keep the gate the only objective.

signature.mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP Hamming/range-distance bucket feedback on the _keys[0] <= use_category() <= _keys[1] range comparison keeps near-miss category sequences alive as corpus, climbing toward the case-10 transition that cmplog cannot retain.
signature.one_line: CMP_MAP range-distance gradient steers glyph-category bytes to case-10 transition

analysis.summary_one_line: A glyph-category byte sequence decoding to the sakot-terminated USE syllable, driving the Ragel state machine into the case-10 transition action.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A run of bytes whose use_category() values form the exact glyph-category prefix the USE machine needs to reach the case-10 (use_sakot_terminated_cluster) transition; the winner seeds carry concentrated 0x25/0x16/0x06 category runs at offsets 0x00-0x23.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile_cmplog preserves intermediate inputs whose CMP-operand distance to the required category-key boundary shrinks, climbing the _keys[0] <= use_category() <= _keys[1] range comparison via CMP_MAP gradient buckets; the winner resolves the case-10 true side (W tag at line 981, T=4 in DIVERGENT BRANCHES).
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: cmplog has the I2S substitution stage but no CMP_MAP gradient feedback, so partial-progress inputs toward the category-range key are not retained as corpus and the case-10 transition is never reached (loser blocked=10/10, T=0 at line 981).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient (Hamming/range-distance bucket feedback on the _keys[0] <= use_category() <= _keys[1] comparison at lines 966-967) keeps near-miss category sequences alive; this is the technique cmplog lacks, so it is the axis distinguishing this pair.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is case 10, the use_sakot_terminated_cluster transition action inside the USE Ragel syllable machine.
Reaching the blocker requires the trans-action table to dispatch into case 10 from the glyph-category-driven switch.
The state machine transition is selected by a range comparison on use_category() against per-state key bounds.
Only value_profile_cmplog resolves the branch; cmplog never resolves it across 10 trials.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
winner: resolved=9/10  blocked=1  unreached=0
  loser:  resolved=0/10  blocked=10  unreached=0

evidence_trail.claim: Pair 1's technique delta is value_profile (vpc beats cmplog).
Pair 2's technique delta is I2S (vpc beats value_profile).
value_profile preserves inputs whose CMP-operand pair is closer to matching, via new CMP_MAP buckets.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
An input that produces a
CMP-operand pair closer to matching than any previously-seen pair
adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus.

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog lacks the CMP_MAP gradient retention; it uses the per-execution CMP buffer for I2S substitution instead of feedback.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
The CMP buffer is
consumed by the mutator, not by feedback.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile has no I2SRandReplace mutator.
I2SRandReplace substitutes one intercepted CMP operand into the input at matching offsets.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.

evidence_trail.claim: The winner seeds carry concentrated category-code byte runs (0x25/0x16/0x06) at the leading offsets the machine reads.
The case-10 true side is taken only in the winner-resolving role (T=4 W) and never in the loser-blocking role (T=0 L).
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L 981  T=4 F=52  T=0 F=1370  case 10:  <-- BLOCKER

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating case 10 on a use_category() range comparison in which both cmplog (with I2S only) and value_profile (with CMP_MAP only) each resolve the branch alone, showing neither technique is individually necessary.

analysis.weakest_evidence_point: The attribution of Pair 1 to the CMP_MAP gradient assumes the per-state range comparison _keys[0] <= use_category() <= _keys[1] produces gradient-informative buckets, which the prompt shows structurally but not by a measured bucket-distance trace.

signature.mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace reads the intercepted use_category() range-comparison operands and substitutes the needed category-key byte directly into the input, dispatching the syllable machine to case 10 where value_profile's havoc drift cannot.
signature.one_line: I2S stamps exact category-key byte dispatching USE syllable machine to case 10

analysis.summary_one_line: A glyph-category byte sequence decoding to the sakot-terminated USE syllable, driving the Ragel state machine into the case-10 transition action.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: Specific glyph-category code bytes (e.g. the USE category literals in the 0x25/0x16/0x05 run) placed at the offsets the syllable machine reads, so the trans-action table dispatches to case 10.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile_cmplog's I2SRandReplace reads the intercepted use_category() range-comparison operands and substitutes the needed category-key byte directly into the input; the winning seed 5542b009878a902b carries an I2S-floor dash-row ancestor (depth 20), and resolves the case-10 branch.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: value_profile has the CMP_MAP gradient but no I2SRandReplace mutator, so it cannot directly stamp the exact category-key byte the comparison wants and must rely on slow havoc drift; the loser stays blocked 9/10 (T=0 at line 981).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog's I2SRandReplace substitution copies the intercepted category-comparison operand into the input at matching offsets, the technique value_profile lacks; this is the axis distinguishing this pair.
